{{CargoOrgan
|name=Silicone Gel Implant
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10811
|idx=12
|description=Made by the Koryeon Plastic Surgery Hospital, it has undergone strict safety tests and will give you a huge advantage in life!
|skill=
|hp=1110
|def=98
|atk=77
|rush=132
|gene1=When in Angel Form:
> Gain +2% Fungus Chests in explorations
|gene2=Water RES +30
|gene3=Quarry Max Cap +1.5%
|gene7=When in Angel Form:
> Gain +2% Fungus Chests in explorations (Awakened)
|}}
